cart.title: Shopping Cart
checkout.title: Checkout
account.title: My Account
feed.title: Product Feed
feed.description: Machine-readable product data for AI agents and integrations.
feed.howItWorksText: AI agents can discover and query our full product catalog through standardized feed endpoints. The feed includes product titles, descriptions, prices, availability, variants, and images.
acp.title: Agentic Commerce Protocol
acp.subtitle: Let AI agents buy on your behalf
acp.whatIsAcpText: The Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP) enables AI agents — like ChatGPT, Claude, or custom assistants — to discover products, add items to a cart, and complete purchases programmatically through our headless API.
acp.step1: The AI agent discovers products via the product feed.
acp.step2: It creates a cart and adds items using the Cart API.
acp.step3: It initiates checkout via the ACP checkout endpoint.
acp.step4: Payment is handled securely through Stripe.
